title: Think Eye: per-workspace VS Code status card overlay
desc: EyeCard WPF overlay spawned by Eye per VS Code window. Upper-right 5px. Dim 50% unfocused, transparent hover-when-focused, WS_EX_TRANSPARENT click-through, IsIconic hide on minimize. GetCursorPos poll avoids MouseEnter/Leave flicker.

requirements.expect: card appears upper-right of VS Code window

author: claude
